afterSnapshot.name: withValidatedCoords
afterSnapshot.purpose: Parse and validate lat/lon from query params, then delegate to a callback with error wrapping.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Both getWeather and getDirections have identical ~15-line blocks for coordinate parsing, NaN checks, range validation, and try/catch error wrapping. Extracting this eliminates the duplication.
implementation: Accepts Hono context, an async callback, and an error label. Returns 400 early for missing/invalid coords, delegates to callback on success, wraps unexpected errors in a 500 with the caller-specific label for distinguishable logs.
